text: The sterile glass and orderliness of the first room evoke a sense of clarity and anticipation, as if waiting for an idea or dialogue to fill the empty chairs. Entering the R+D space, vibrant colors and bold words create an atmosphere of intellectual curiosity. I feel drawn in by the invitation to contemplate how we innovate and coexist with technology. A sense of inspiration stirs within me, tempered by the awareness of being both observer and participant in this ongoing dance between human ingenuity and structured environments.
